sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, start_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, start_date) VALUES (1, CURRENT_DATE);
UPDATE test_dates SET start_date = start_date + to_days(10) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, start_date, start_date + to_days(5) AS new_date FROM test_dates;
DELETE FROM test_dates WHERE start_date < CURRENT_DATE - to_days(7);
